steps.title: Map impression to award
steps.content: The first sentence says voting members were impressed by the album. The next sentence says they awarded the group Best Banda Album, which follows from that favorable impression.

steps.title: Reject contrast transitions
steps.content:
• Choice A: In contrast signals opposition, but the award matches the positive impression.
  • Choice B: Meanwhile suggests a separate simultaneous event, not a result.
  • Choice C: Nevertheless signals despite that, which conflicts with the cause-and-effect relationship.

steps.title: Choose the result transition
steps.content: The transition must show that the award was a consequence of the voters being impressed. The answer is D.
